title: plantago maritima subvar. bracteata
intro: Plantago maritima subvar. bracteata, also known as Sea Plantain, is a type of plant that belongs to the Plantago genus and is native to coastal areas. The medicinal properties of Plantago maritima subvar. bracteata include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which are commonly used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include soothing digestive issues, reducing swelling and pain, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Plantago maritima subvar. bracteata can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
